creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
[Resent as i messed up the subject in the previous mail]

Hi,

this should no longer be a problem.

Here are the library version which get installed:
6-STABLE:		/usr/lib/libasn1.so.8
7-STABLE:		/usr/lib/libasn1.so.9
8-STABLE:		/usr/lib/libasn1.so.10
9-CURRENT:		/usr/lib/libasn1.so.10
security/heimdal:	/usr/local/lib/libasn1.so.8

The shlib bump was done before RELENG_7_0_0_RELEASE was tagged.
The environment of the PR submitter shows 7.0-BETA2 which was probably before 
the shlib bump.

Anyway, this PR should be closed as 6.x is EOL end of November 2010 and all 
other supported FreeBSD versions install higher versions of this library.

Kind regards
Joerg

-- 
The beginning is the most important part of the work.
 				-Plato
